title: Creamy Italian White Bean Salad
description: A refreshing Italian-inspired salad made with cannellini beans, creamy dressing, and crunchy vegetables. Great as a side dish or light lunch.

ingredients.name: salad
ingredients.notes: mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, red onion

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the cannellini beans, olive oil, white wine vinegar, and creamy Italian dressing. Toss to coat.
Add the mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and red onion to the bowl. Toss to combine.
Top the salad with grated Parmesan cheese and crispy prosciutto slices.
